tasks.label: Docker: Reset DB
tasks.command: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d --build && docker compose exec -T web php scripts/ensure_default_admin.php

tasks.label: Docker: Bootstrap Galaxy
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/bootstrap_galaxy.php

tasks.label: Docker: Backfill Star Metadata
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/backfill_star_system_metadata.php --all --batch=2000

tasks.label: Test: NPC Avatar + Leader Smoke
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/test_npc_avatar_leader_system.php

tasks.label: Test: Wormhole Beacon Unlock
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/test_wormhole_beacon_unlock.php

tasks.label: Test: Pirates Endpoint Smoke
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/test_pirates_endpoint_smoke.php

tasks.label: Test: Economy Endpoint Smoke
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/test_economy_endpoint_smoke.php

tasks.label: Test: War Endpoint Smoke
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/test_war_endpoint_smoke.php

tasks.label: Test: War Forced Peace Tick Smoke
Test: War Goal Progress Smoke
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/test_war_goal_progress_smoke.php

tasks.label: Test: War Attrition Goal Smoke
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/test_war_attrition_goal_smoke.php

tasks.label: Test Data: Bulk Universe Seed
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/seed_test_universe.php --users=100 --npcs=20 --profiles=0

tasks.label: Test Data: Dev Overview Seed
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/seed_dev_overview.php --verbose

tasks.label: Test Data: Full Seed (One Click)
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/bootstrap_galaxy.php; docker compose exec -T web php scripts/backfill_star_system_metadata.php --all --batch=2000; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_gameplay_model_v1.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v1.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v2.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v3.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v4.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v5.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v6_planetary_events.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v7_research_phase5.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v8_wormholes.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/migrate_vessel_blueprints_v9_wormhole_beacons.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; docker compose exec -T web php scripts/sync_faction_specs.php; Get-Content -Raw sql/test_gameplay_model_seed.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; Get-Content -Raw sql/test_gameplay_model_checks.sql | docker compose exec -T db mysql -uroot -proot galaxyquest; docker compose exec -T web php scripts/seed_test_universe.php --users=100 --npcs=20 --profiles=0

tasks.label: TRELLIS2: Generate Ship (Text CLI)
tasks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/trellis2_generate.ps1 -Mode text -Prompt "a modular hard-surface sci-fi cargo ship with engine nacelles"

tasks.label: TRELLIS2: Import GLB as Dev Asset
Temp: Test Admin Stats Endpoint
tasks.command: docker compose exec -T web php scripts/test_admin_stats_endpoint.php

inputs.description: Pfad zur GLB-Datei (relativ zu Workspace oder absolut)
